message:
wa-dug.6: implement setup wizard with environment detection

Add SetupWizard to setup.rs that uses DetectedEnvironment and AutoConfig
to provide a guided first-run experience. The wizard detects WezTerm,
shell, agents, remotes, and system characteristics, then generates
optimal configuration.

- SetupWizard struct with detect/generate_config/finish flow
- DetectionStep, WizardChoice, WizardResult types
- Auto-config application to Config struct fields
- Config file saving with parent directory creation
- default_config_save_path() for platform-appropriate config location
- Updated run_guided_setup to use wizard (async, shows recommendations)
- Removed unused detect_wezterm_version from main.rs
- 11 unit tests covering detection, config generation, and save flow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
